---
title: "Getting Started"
---

## Install

```bash
go install github.com/neural-chilli/qp/cmd/qp@latest
```

## Create `qp.yaml`

```bash
qp init
```

Minimal starter:

```yaml
project: my-service
default: check

tasks:
  lint:
    desc: Lint code
    cmd: golangci-lint run

  test:
    desc: Run tests
    cmd: go test ./...

  check:
    desc: Local verification
    run: par(lint, test)
```

## Core Commands

```bash
qp list
qp help check
qp check
qp guard
```

## Safety Defaults

Use `safety` on tasks and run unsafe tasks only with explicit opt-in:

```bash
qp deploy --allow-unsafe
```
